latex:
Which word change makes the question a statistical question?

How many chapters are there in each book?

\begin{enumerate}
\item[a.] Change ``chapters'' to ``pages''
\item[b.] Change ``each book'' to ``this book''
\item[c.] Change ``chapters'' to ``sentences''
\item[d.] Change ``book'' to ``novels in the library''
\end{enumerate}
choices_latex: d. Change ``book'' to ``novels in the library''
